<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fa" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ایمان خوانساری | کارآموز وکالت</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Vazirmatn:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Noto+Naskh+Arabic:wght@500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#12181F;
    --ink-2:#1B222B;
    --ivory:#F3EFE6;
    --brass:#B08D57;
    --brass-dim:#8A7148;
    --slate:#6B7480;
    --line:#2A323C;
    --gold-1:#5C4620;
    --gold-2:#D9AF5C;
    --gold-3:#FDF0C8;
    --gold-4:#B8873B;
    --gold-5:#7A5A26;
  }
  *{ box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
  .gold-text{
    background-image: linear-gradient(115deg,
      var(--gold-1) 0%, var(--gold-4) 18%, var(--gold-3) 38%,
      var(--gold-2) 52%, var(--gold-1) 68%, var(--gold-3) 84%, var(--gold-4) 100%);
    background-size: 220% 220%;
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    color: transparent;
  }
  html,body{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--ivory);
    font-family:'Vazirmatn', sans-serif;
    min-height:100vh;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  body{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    padding:56px 20px 80px;
  }
  .page{
    width:100%;
    max-width:440px;
  }

  /* ---- Letterhead / seal ---- */
  .letterhead{
    text-align:center;
    padding-bottom:34px;
    margin-bottom:34px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    position:relative;
  }
  .seal{
    width:96px;
    height:96px;
    margin:0 auto 22px;
    border-radius:50%;
    padding:2px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-1), var(--gold-3) 35%, var(--gold-2) 55%, var(--gold-5) 100%);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    position:relative;
  }
  .seal::after{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--ink);
  }
  .seal::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    inset:9px;
    border:1px solid var(--gold-4);
    border-radius:50%;
    opacity:.5;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .seal img{
    width:68%;
    height:68%;
    object-fit:contain;
    position:relative;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .name{
    font-family:'Noto Naskh Arabic', serif;
    font-size:21px;
    font-weight:600;
    color:var(--ivory);
    letter-spacing:.3px;
    margin-bottom:8px;
    line-height:1.5;
    padding:0 10px;
  }
  .title{
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:400;
    color:var(--slate);
    letter-spacing:.3px;
  }
  .title::before, .title::after{
    content:"—";
    color:var(--gold-4);
    margin:0 8px;
  }

  /* ---- Links ---- */
  .links{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .link-row{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:16px;
    padding:16px 18px;
    background:var(--ink-2);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:10px;
    text-decoration:none;
    color:var(--ivory);
    transition:border-color .18s ease, transform .18s ease, background .18s ease;
  }
  .link-row:hover{
    border-color:var(--brass-dim);
    background:#20272F;
    transform:translateY(-1px);
  }
  .icon{
    width:38px;
    height:38px;
    flex:none;
    border-radius:50%;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .icon svg{ width:18px; height:18px; stroke:url(#goldMetal); }
  .label{
    flex:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:2px;
  }
  .label .platform{
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:500;
  }
  .label .handle{
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--slate);
    direction:ltr;
    text-align:right;
    unicode-bidi:embed;
  }
  .arrow{
    color:var(--slate);
    font-size:16px;
    flex:none;
  }

  footer{
    text-align:center;
    margin-top:40px;
    font-size:11.5px;
    color:var(--slate);
    letter-spacing:.3px;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute">
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="goldMetal" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5C4620"/>
        <stop offset="20%" stop-color="#B8873B"/>
        <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#FDF0C8"/>
        <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#D9AF5C"/>
        <stop offset="80%" stop-color="#5C4620"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B8873B"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
  </svg>
  <div class="page">

    <div class="letterhead">
      <div class="seal"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="آرم مرکز وکلا"></div>
      <div class="name">Iman Khansari ( ایمان خوانساری )</div>
      <div class="title">کارآموز وکالت</div>
    </div>

    <div class="links">

      <a class="link-row" href="https://instagram.com/vakil_imankhansari" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><circle cx="17.2" cy="6.8" r="1"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">اینستاگرام</span>
          <span class="handle">@vakil_imankhansari</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

      <a class="link-row" href="https://t.me/vakil_imankhansari" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M21 4L3 11l6 2m12-9l-4 17-8-6m12-11L9 13"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">تلگرام</span>
          <span class="handle">@vakil_imankhansari</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

      <a class="link-row" href="https://wa.me/989169859808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M20 12a8 8 0 1 1-3.6-6.7"/><path d="M12 4a8 8 0 0 1 8 8"/><path d="M8 10c0 3 2 5 5 5l1.5-1.5L17 15l-1 2c-3 0-8-3-8-8l2-1 1.5 2.5L10 10Z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">واتساپ</span>
          <span class="handle">+98 916 985 9808</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

      <a class="link-row" href="https://eitaa.com/vakil_imankhansari" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M21 6.5L3 12l6.5 2m11.5-7.5L14 20l-4.5-6M21 6.5L9.5 14"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">ایتا</span>
          <span class="handle">@vakil_imankhansari</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

      <a class="link-row" href="https://ble.ir/vakil_imankhansari" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><path d="M4 4h13a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v7a3 3 0 0 1-3 3H9l-5 4V4Z"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">بله</span>
          <span class="handle">@vakil_imankhansari</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

      <a class="link-row" href="https://rubika.ir/vakil_imankhansari" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="icon">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="4"/><path d="M9 8h6M9 12h6M9 16h3"/></svg>
        </span>
        <span class="label">
          <span class="platform">روبیکا</span>
          <span class="handle">@vakil_imankhansari</span>
        </span>
        <span class="arrow">‹</span>
      </a>

    </div>

    <footer>ایمان خوانساری — کارآموز وکالت</footer>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
